headline: Terraform AWS fanatic
summary: Anton is a long-time developer and CTO. He runs a consulting company Betajob in Norway and has helped companies around the globe build solutions using AWS and specializing in Infrastructure-as-Code, DevOps, and reusable infrastructure components since 2015. Through his consulting and ongoing experimentation with new technologies, Anton also created compliance.tf, a product that helps companies in regulated industries simplify and automate compliance when using Terraform. He spends much of his time as an open-source contributor on various Terraform & AWS projects. Such as Terraform AWS modules (provisioned more than 2 billion times), Terraform best practices ebook (https://www.terraform-best-practices.com/), Serverless Terraform framework (https://serverless.tf), Terraform Weekly newsletter (https://weekly.tf), Your Weekly Dose of Terraform live streams (https://www.youtube.com/AntonBabenkoLive), and more (https://github.com/antonbabenko/terraform-aws-devops). Anton enjoys solving current cloud architecture tasks, figuring out generic solutions by getting to the core, and making them available as open-source to benefit the AWS community. Anton co-founded and co-organizes AWS, DevOps, and HashiCorp User Groups in Oslo (Norway) and often speaks at technical meetups and conferences.
